3047430.name: Скуфы против ящеров
3047430.description:
Deep down, you've always wanted this game. Who are Supermen and Batmen? Rich and pumped-up beauties that women adore. And who are we? Ordinary hard workers who sometimes want to relax with a frothy drink and play tanks. But they called us the skoofs for that.

So, know this: being a scoof is cool! All the toughest men in history were scoofs, whether it was Churchill or Zhirinovsky. They were always the center of attention!

So stop putting up with it! Stop playing games where you wear underpants over tights. Put on your skufander and go save the world from the cursed kites!

After all, you are not just a skuf — you are a descendant of the glorious Rus!

Skoofs vs Lizards is a 2D Beat ' em up game where you have to fight against enemies. The game's plot is presented in the form of animated comics. The game was created for fun and does not try to offend anyone.
Use the "ad" buttons to move around the location, use the right mouse button to beat the enemies. In the game you need to defeat the lizards to bring peace back to the planet.

    Game Features:
  • A fun soundtrack
  • The first game in which you play for skuf
  • You can beat the lizards
  • Everything is strictly based on scientific facts
  • Altushka
3047430.supported_languages:
俄语*, 英语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
